title: Ready Set Go.
excerpt: Summer's just started, but already we’re fast forwarding into fall by announcing details of my newest release with American Crafts . It will debut at CHA in Chicago just a few weeks and will start shipping to stores in mid-August.…
body:
Summer's just started, but already we’re fast forwarding into fall by announcing details of my newest release with American Crafts. It will debut at CHA in Chicago just a few weeks and will start shipping to stores in mid-August.

Jump into the eclectic fun of designer Amy Tan’s newest line, Amy Tangerine Ready Set Go. A wide array of warm autumn colors — including navy blue, pink and wood grain — create a base for unique travel, home and school icons: From cameras, cars and houses, to globes, speech bubbles and an adorable hand-drawn elephant. Whether at home or abroad, find adventure with Amy Tangerine Ready Set Go.

All supplies from Ready Set Go // Photos are 2"x2" Instagram prints from Persnickety Prints. Check this post for a free shipping code.

We're celebrating with some sneak peeks. Join in on the fun, as some talented friends are hosting a look at various products on their blogs. paige evans kelly marie shimelle kelly purkey kayla aimee ali edwards

Visit all the blogs and leave a comment telling us what you liked best! There are 2 chances to win the entire collection, one on the American Crafts blog and one right here! Comments will close at 7am PST Friday, July 6th and one of the winners will be announced here. Good luck!

COMMENTS ARE NOW CLOSED, THANKS TO EVERYONE WHO ENTERED!

THE WINNER IS: Pamage says: July 2, 2012 at 1:17 pm (Edit) all the woodgrain shapes and how you used them on the layout above. be still my heart.
